title: Zebkit zbk-select Token Overrides
description: Authorable overrides for the zbk-select token module.

displayToken.description: Display mode for the <zbk-select> host element.

a11y.description: Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.
Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.

dimensionToken.description: Border thickness of the field box.

strokeStyleToken.description: Border style of the field box.

a11y.description: Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.

fontFamilyToken.description: Font family for the selected option's text.

a11y.description: Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.

source.description: Where this font family is loaded from.

fallback.description: Fallback stack category appended to the authored family.

weights.description: Static font weights or a variable-font range such as 200..800.

cssDimensionToken.description: Font size for the selected option's text.

a11y.description: Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.

numberToken.description: Line height for the selected option's text.

flexToken.description: Flow direction of a .zbk-select-group (column or row).

a11y.description: Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.

transitionPropertyToken.description: CSS properties that animate on state changes.

a11y.description: Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.

scale.description: Fluid-scale controls for this module (e.g. min-viewport/max-viewport/min-base/max-base/min-ratio/max-ratio on font-size, max-scale on spacing).

invalid.description: Field background when the selection is invalid (after interaction).
Selected-option text color when the selection is invalid.

anyOf.description: Border color of the field box.

color-invalid.description: Field border color when the selection is invalid.

width.description: Border thickness of the field box.

style.description: Border style of the field box.

radius.description: Corner radius of the field box.

invalid.description: Field border color when the selection is invalid.

family.description: Font family for the selected option's text.

size.description: Font size for the selected option's text.

weight.description: Font weight for the selected option's text.

height.description: Line height for the selected option's text.

spacing.description: Letter spacing for the selected option's text.

gap.description: Space between the label and the field box.

anyOf.description: Color of prefix/suffix affix content (icon fonts and currentColor SVGs inherit it).

size.description: Size of slotted affix content (prefix/suffix slots); 1em tracks the field's font-size so size variants rescale it.

anyOf.description: Color of the drawn chevron indicator.

size.description: Side length of the drawn chevron; 0.5em tracks the field's font-size.

stroke-width.description: Stroke width of the drawn chevron.

width.description: Stroke width of the drawn chevron.

inline.description: Inline (horizontal) padding of the field box.

block.description: Block (vertical) padding of the field box.

width.description: Minimum width of the field box.

height.description: Minimum field height to ensure a tappable area.

width.description: Maximum width of the field box.

direction.description: Flow direction of a .zbk-select-group (column or row).

shadow-focus.description: Field shadow while focused (in addition to the outline).

shadow-invalid.description: Field shadow when the selection is invalid.

focus.description: Field shadow while focused (in addition to the outline).

invalid.description: Field shadow when the selection is invalid.

property.description: CSS properties that animate on state changes.

display.description: Display mode for the <zbk-select> host element.

canvas-invalid.description: Field background when the selection is invalid (after interaction).

anyOf.description: Color of the selected option's text.

ink-invalid.description: Selected-option text color when the selection is invalid.

border-color-invalid.description: Field border color when the selection is invalid.

border-width.description: Border thickness of the field box.

border-style.description: Border style of the field box.

border-radius.description: Corner radius of the field box.

font-family.description: Font family for the selected option's text.

font-size.description: Font size for the selected option's text.

font-weight.description: Font weight for the selected option's text.

line-height.description: Line height for the selected option's text.

letter-spacing.description: Letter spacing for the selected option's text.

label-gap.description: Space between the label and the field box.

anyOf.description: Color of prefix/suffix affix content (icon fonts and currentColor SVGs inherit it).

icon-size.description: Size of slotted affix content (prefix/suffix slots); 1em tracks the field's font-size so size variants rescale it.

anyOf.description: Color of the drawn chevron indicator.

indicator-size.description: Side length of the drawn chevron; 0.5em tracks the field's font-size.

indicator-stroke-width.description: Stroke width of the drawn chevron.

padding-inline.description: Inline (horizontal) padding of the field box.

padding-block.description: Block (vertical) padding of the field box.

gap.description: Space between affixes, the select, and the indicator.

min-width.description: Minimum width of the field box.

max-width.description: Maximum width of the field box.

min-height.description: Minimum field height to ensure a tappable area.

group-direction.description: Flow direction of a .zbk-select-group (column or row).
